stages.label: Cataloged Source
stages.description: A source has enough metadata to be retrieved and reviewed.
stages.minimum_support_expected: A source record with a stable locator.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Treating a catalog entry as a verified finding.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Extract an observation from the source.

stages.label: Observation Extracted
stages.description: A bounded observation has been extracted from an archived source.
stages.minimum_support_expected: A finding linked to source and artifact records.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Assuming the observation applies beyond the fixture context.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Map the observation into a reviewed claim.

stages.label: Reviewed Archive Claim
stages.description: A claim has passed configured appraisal lanes for source fidelity, scope fit, and context boundaries.
stages.minimum_support_expected: Complete non-blocking appraisals for required lanes.
stages.common_overclaim_risk: Confusing reviewed fixture coverage with complete knowledge.
stages.moves_to_next_stage: Continue review updates for new archived materials.
